We’re making history. 🌍
We’re premiering the world’s first African original vertical drama, an industry first that shifts the way stories are told and shared across the globe. We are excited to announce that “The Love Jam Network” is coming soon to myvurt.com 

This isn’t just another movie premiere. We are creating pathways for creators everywhere to reach audiences on their own terms.

We’re excited to premiere @binyumatv from writer @ruyongamusic 

🚨Filmmakers, this is your moment. The world is watching.
🎬 Submit, watch, and be part of the future at
Myvurt. Com
